message:
feat(fnp-python): add numpy.hanning + hamming + blackman window wrappers (br-franken_numpy-fzsm, br-franken_numpy-0zp4, br-franken_numpy-1zvx)

Expose fnp_python.hanning, .hamming, and .blackman delegating to the
matching numpy window functions. Joint parity test covers:
- edge cases M=0 (empty), M=1, small M=2,3,8,16,33
- array shape (M,) parity
- float64 dtype parity
- window symmetry at M=32
